name: agent-companion
description: Attach an OpenCode or Copilot companion to the Codex CLI harness. Agent Companion spawns a private subagent with a dedicated MCP bridge so token-heavy coding work leaves the parent context clean.

interface.shortDescription: Attach OpenCode or Copilot companions to Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex subagent that delegates implementation, review, and research work to a chosen companion runtime, currently OpenCode or GitHub Copilot CLI, through a private MCP bridge, per-host runtime state, and completion drain hooks. The public direction is harness plus companion now, with future strength-routed companion profiles.
defaultPrompt: Ask the agent companion to review this repository
Delegate this implementation to the agent companion
